set.sourceBehavior: `strings.xml` centralizes the source app's user-visible labels and route-facing text so Compose screens and navigation surfaces read consistent resource-backed strings instead of hard-coded literals.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS maps that base string configuration into `string.json` resource entries plus `foodike_resources.cj` lookup handles, and the translated route registry resolves route labels from those resources for the phase-01 shell.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed every source `strings.xml` entry is present in `entry/src/main/resources/base/element/string.json` and exported through `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/foodike_resources.cj`.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

Harness blocked: `cjpm test` in `entry/src/test/cangjie` failed before executing tests because root package `ohos_app_cangjie_entry` imports `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource` without matching dependencies in `entry/cjpm.toml`.
set.notes: This row closes against concrete resource and route-label helpers instead of whole shell files.

testEvidence.detail: `cjpm test` in `entry/src/test/cangjie` stops before executing tests because root package `ohos_app_cangjie_entry` imports `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource` without matching dependencies in `entry/cjpm.toml`.

manualEvidence.detail: `strings.xml` entries are preserved in HarmonyOS resource files and consumed by the focused route-label helpers.

set.sourceBehavior: The source `strings.xml` provides user-visible labels for navigation destinations and primary actions that accompany the Android app's cross-screen route flow.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS replaces Android intent-style screen flow with explicit route ids, route paths, route labels, and primary-action label helpers that still read their user-facing text from migrated string resources.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed `route_registry.cj` maps `home`, `history`, `cart`, `profile`, and detail destinations to resource-backed labels from `foodike_resources.cj`.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

Harness blocked: `cjpm test` in `entry/src/test/cangjie` failed before executing tests because root package `ohos_app_cangjie_entry` imports `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource` without matching dependencies in `entry/cjpm.toml`.
set.notes: This row closes against focused route-registry functions instead of broad shell-page endpoints.

testEvidence.detail: `cjpm test` in `entry/src/test/cangjie` stops before executing tests because root package `ohos_app_cangjie_entry` imports `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource` without matching dependencies in `entry/cjpm.toml`.

manualEvidence.detail: Route labels and primary-action labels remain resource-backed while route flow moves from Android intents to explicit Harmony route helpers.

set.sourceBehavior: `strings.xml` contains no permission prompt, denial, rationale, or protected-capability labels; it only defines general app copy and navigation text.
set.targetBehavior: No HarmonyOS permission text resource is needed in phase 01 because the translated shell introduces no runtime-permission flow and the source values file carries none.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml` has onboarding, login, profile, detail, and cart copy only, with no permission-specific strings.
Manual target review confirmed `entry/src/main/module.json5` keeps `requestPermissions` empty in phase 01.
set.notes: Static-analysis false positive: the source values file contains no runtime-permission copy to migrate.

manualEvidence.detail: The source strings inventory has no permission-related labels, and the HarmonyOS entry module keeps `requestPermissions` empty.

set.sourceBehavior: The source Android `strings.xml` file is the canonical values-file container for app labels, onboarding copy, login/profile/cart/detail text, and navigation labels.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS preserves that values-file role with `string.json` as the concrete resource store and `foodike_resources.cj` as the typed lookup layer used by route and feature code.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed source string keys are migrated into `entry/src/main/resources/base/element/string.json` and exported through `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/foodike_resources.cj`.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

manualEvidence.detail: The source Android values file has been migrated into HarmonyOS string resources with a focused typed lookup helper.

set.sourceBehavior: `themes.xml` configures the Android light no-action-bar app theme and splash theme, including white splash background, launcher icon, and post-splash handoff back into the main Foodike theme.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS replaces those Android theme resources with descriptor-driven app and start-window configuration plus focused theme constants that preserve the light baseline, white startup background, launcher icon wiring, and app theme palette anchors.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed `entry/src/main/module.json5` maps the start window to `$color:start_window_background` and `$media:icon`, while `AppScope/app.json5` keeps the resource-backed app label and icon.
Manual review confirmed `foodike_theme.cj` preserves the source light palette and primary/secondary color anchors.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

testEvidence.detail: `cjpm test` in `entry/src/test/cangjie` stops before executing tests because root package `ohos_app_cangjie_entry` imports `kit.AbilityKit`, `kit.ArkUI`, and `ohos.resource` without matching dependencies in `entry/cjpm.toml`.

manualEvidence.detail: Descriptor start-window fields and theme constants together replace the Android splash and base theme configuration.

set.sourceBehavior: `themes.xml` contains only app-theme and splash-theme styling items and defines no runtime-permission theme overlay or protected-capability UI behavior.
set.targetBehavior: No permission-specific HarmonyOS theme or permission flow is needed in phase 01 because the source theme file contains none and the entry module requests no permissions.
verificationEvidence: Manual source review confirmed `app/src/main/res/values/themes.xml` contains only `Theme.Foodike` and `Theme.SplashScreenTheme` definitions.
Manual target review confirmed `entry/src/main/module.json5` keeps `requestPermissions` empty in phase 01.
set.notes: Static-analysis false positive: the source theme file contains no permission behavior to migrate.

manualEvidence.detail: The source theme file contains no permission overlays or protected-capability theme content, and the HarmonyOS module keeps `requestPermissions` empty.

set.sourceBehavior: The source Android `themes.xml` file defines the app's base theme and splash theme as values-file style resources.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS replaces that Android values-file theme role with `module.json5` start-window resource binding, `app.json5` app metadata binding, and focused theme constants in `foodike_theme.cj`.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed the translated theme and splash semantics are carried by `entry/src/main/module.json5`, `AppScope/app.json5`, `entry/src/main/resources/base/element/color.json`, and `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/foodike_theme.cj`.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

manualEvidence.detail: Android theme values are replaced by HarmonyOS descriptor resources and explicit theme constants.

set.sourceBehavior: `colors.xml` defines the source palette entries that support the app theme, accent colors, and shared visual styling.
set.targetBehavior: HarmonyOS maps those palette entries into `color.json` resources and reuses the same key colors in `foodike_theme.cj` for the translated theme baseline.
verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed all source color entries from `colors.xml` exist in `entry/src/main/resources/base/element/color.json`.
Manual review confirmed the translated theme constants preserve the source LightGreen/DarkGreen palette anchors in `entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/common/foodike_theme.cj`.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.

manualEvidence.detail: The source palette colors are preserved in HarmonyOS color resources and mirrored by focused theme constants.

verificationEvidence: Manual review confirmed `entry/src/main/resources/base/element/color.json` contains `ic_launcher_background` with the source color value.
Phase 01 build gate PASS: `translation-inputs/build-reports/phase-01-project-skeleton-resources/build-report.md`.
